title: Instant Card View clicking on pulse name
excerpt:

actually when you click in the pulse name it opens the updates section (that should open only when you click in the update icon right next to the puls…

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ii think the card view should open when you click in the PULSE NAME,

actually when you click in the pulse name it opens the updates section (that should open only when you click in the update icon right next to the pulse`s name.

In the android app this card view opens like i was saying, i think desktop app should do the same.

benefits: to easily edit or see pulses with many columns.

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: I cannot agree more! We have boards with over 20 rows and finding the right information can be tedious and causes many users errors. At times, our team is using their iPads or phones even when sitting at their desk because it’s easier to read.

posts.author: BillClearwaterFL (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m a new user and this quickly came to mind. I’ve already got so many columns that there is a lot of side scrolling happening.
